layers.prompt_used: IMAGE 1 is the authoritative product photograph. Preserve the exact product identity, shape, proportions, colors, materials, packaging and visible details. Do not replace, redesign or invent product features. Product: 军事士兵人偶模型. Visual style: 写实军事风格. Create a vertical A+/detail-page image with structured sections, close-up visual storytelling and product benefits: ['精细的军事服饰细节', '配备仿真武器配件', '立体分色涂装', '经典士兵造型'].

description: generate_product_set: 用户要求做A+详情图，产品为军事士兵人偶模型，已有上传的商品参考图。根据决策规则，A+/详情页应使用generate_product_set动作生成一组详情图，包括描述图和细节图，以完整呈现产品卖点。
